item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Italian pasta with hearty meat sauce – Al dente pasta with arich, slow-simmered meat sauce made from organic beef. Topped withgolden grated Parmesan and fresh basil (1, 6).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Coconut-panko crusted Caribbean fish cake – Juicy fish cakewith Caribbean spices, coated in coconut and panko. Served with Jamaicancoleslaw and roasted sweet potatoes, topped with fresh herbs. Accompanied byMarie Rose sauce, mango-bell pepper chutney, and lemon (1, 2, 6, 11, 13). GREEN DISH: Coconut-panko crusted Caribbean spiced mushroom GREEN DISH: A vegetarianversion with hearty mushrooms, coated in coconut and panko. Served withJamaican coleslaw and roasted sweet potatoes, topped with fresh herbs.Accompanied by Marie Rose sauce, mango-bell pepper chutney, and lemon (1, 2, 6,11, 13).

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Pasta alla norma – A classic Sicilian dish with crispy fried eggplant ina spiced tomato sauce, topped with crispy bacon. A taste of Southern Italiancuisine (1, 15). GREEN DISH: GREEN DISH: The vegetarian version with crispy fried eggplant ina spiced tomato sauce, topped with fresh basil (1, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Fish of the Day – Fresh, delicate fish served with tender boiledpotatoes, a creamy mussel sauce, and fresh green herb oil. Topped with a tangyfennel salad (3, 6). GREEN DISH: Braised Fennel – Soft, caramelized fennel with creamy bean purée and alight herb vinaigrette. Served with a fresh fennel salad (6, 13).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Asian stir-fried chicken – Spicy and tender chicken stir-friedwith an abundance of crisp sliced vegetables. Served with noodles, topped withpickled bamboo shoots and fresh coriander (1, 3, 7, 8, 13, 15). GREEN DISH: Asian stir-fried tempeh – Marinated tempeh stir-fried withcrisp sliced vegetables. Served with noodles, topped with pickled bamboo shootsand fresh coriander (1, 3, 7, 8, 13, 15).
